system.flavor: Your momentum pushes your allies forward, as you skillfully direct their strikes.
system.effect:
Effect 3
Attack: 1 damage, Hit: +1d3 damage
Effect [X]: One, (4+) two, or (6+) three allies adjacent to your target may also dash 3, then may deal 2 damage to a different adjacent foe.
Overdrive all dashes by +3
